hero.title:
Building India’s
Next Generation of Innovators
hero.subtitle:
A national innovation ecosystem empowering students to ideate,
prototype, and transform ideas into real-world solutions.

about.title: What is an IDEA Lab?
about.description:
An AICTE-recognized IDEA Lab is a multidisciplinary innovation space
where students transform ideas into impactful solutions through
hands-on learning, prototyping, and real-world application.

pillars.title: Ideation
pillars.desc: Identify real-world problems using design thinking and creativity.

pillars.title: Prototyping
pillars.desc: Convert ideas into functional prototypes using advanced tools.

pillars.title: Application
pillars.desc: Scale innovations into startups, patents, and deployable solutions.

facilities_header.title: Facilities & Infrastructure
facilities_header.subtitle: State-of-the-art labs empowering innovation from concept to realization.

facilities.title: Additive Manufacturing Lab
facilities.subtitle: Industrial-grade 3D printing for rapid prototyping and complex part fabrication.

facilities.title: Digital Manufacturing Lab
facilities.subtitle: CNC machining, laser cutting, and digitally controlled fabrication systems.

facilities.title: IoT & Automation Lab
facilities.subtitle: Smart systems development using sensors, controllers, and automation hardware.

facilities.title: Chip / PCB Design Lab
facilities.subtitle: Circuit design, PCB layout, prototyping, and electronic hardware testing.

facilities.title: Product Design Lab
facilities.subtitle: Human-centered product ideation, ergonomics, and design thinking workflows.

facilities.title: Design & Simulation Studio
facilities.subtitle: CAD, CAE, and simulation tools for design validation and optimization.

lifecycle_header.title: Innovation Lifecycle
lifecycle_header.subtitle: A structured journey that transforms ideas into impactful solutions.

lifecycle.title: Identify
lifecycle.desc: Understand real-world problems and user needs.

lifecycle.title: Ideate
lifecycle.desc: Brainstorm creative solutions using design thinking.

lifecycle.title: Prototype
lifecycle.desc: Build functional models using lab infrastructure.

lifecycle.title: Launch
lifecycle.desc: Deploy as startups, patents, or real-world solutions.

programs_header.title: Programs & Activities
programs_header.subtitle: Continuous learning initiatives fostering innovation and skills.

programs.title: Workshops & Bootcamps
programs.desc: Hands-on sessions on prototyping, IoT, AI, and product development.

programs.title: Hackathons & Innovation Challenges
programs.desc: Competitive events encouraging problem-solving and creativity.

programs.title: Faculty Development Programs
programs.desc: Training programs enabling faculty to mentor innovation effectively.

programs.title: Industry & Community Projects
programs.desc: Real-world projects aligned with industry and societal needs.

programs.title: Student Development & Hands-on Skilling Program
programs.desc: Training programs enabling students to innovate effectively.

projects.title: Smart Health Monitoring System using Arduino
projects.desc: An Arduino-based system that continuously monitors vital health parameters such as heart rate, body temperature, and blood oxygen level (SpO2). It displays real-time data on an LCD and generates alerts during abnormal conditions, making it ideal for elderly care, hospitals, and remote health monitoring.

mentors_header.title: Mentors & Leadership
mentors_header.subtitle: Guiding innovation with academic excellence and industry experience.

cta.title: Ready to Build, Innovate & Launch?
cta.desc: Join the IDEA Lab and transform your ideas into impactful innovations with access to world-class facilities, mentors, and funding pathways.

outcomes_header.title: Impact & Outcomes
outcomes_header.subtitle: Building a strong foundation for innovation, skills, and entrepreneurial thinking.

outcomes.title: Hands-on Learning
outcomes.desc: Students actively engaged in multidisciplinary projects and lab-based experimentation.

outcomes.title: Prototype-Driven Approach
outcomes.desc: Focus on building functional prototypes to validate ideas and solve real-world problems.

outcomes.title: Emerging Innovation Pipeline
outcomes.desc: Early-stage ideas progressing toward startups, patents, and industry collaborations.

outcomes.title: Industry Readiness
outcomes.desc: Skill development aligned with industry tools, workflows, and problem-solving practices.

outcomes_footer: These outcomes represent the early impact of the IDEA Lab, with continuous growth expected as student participation, industry engagement, and innovation maturity increase.
